copy.affordable_eligibility_bullets: ["Household income must meet published AMI limits for the unit size (income verification required)","Household size must match unit occupancy limits","Must be a U.S. citizen or meet HUD-eligible immigration status requirements","Complete application and pay any applicable application fee","Pass standard credit, criminal background, and rental history screening","Provide proof of current income (pay stubs, tax returns, benefit letters) and photo ID"]
copy.affordable_intro_body: This new, thoughtfully designed community offers 271 units of affordable workforce housing, placing you directly in one of the city’s most vibrant and connected areas, just steps from the Link Light Rail station. We’ve focused on creating efficient, functional living spaces and incorporating amenities that truly serve our residents and the surrounding area.
copy.affordable_process_steps: ["Review AMI limits and unit sizes to confirm preliminary eligibility","Submit a complete affordable housing application with required income documentation","Application intake and initial eligibility verification by property management","Complete credit, criminal background, and rental reference checks","Receive notification of eligibility status or placement on waitlist/lottery if applicable","If approved, sign lease and provide any required deposits or documentation"]
copy.apartments_additional_text: Full-sized kitchens, stainless-steel appliances, and high-end finishes bring modern comfort to every home. Sliding doors, room separators, and efficient layouts make each space highly functional for everyday living.
copy.apartments_feature_1_text: The beauty of a light-oak hardwood-look adds warmth and modern style throughout your home.
copy.apartments_feature_2_text: Elevate your cooking experience with stylish stainless finishes and quartz countertops.
copy.apartments_feature_3_text: Floor-to-ceiling windows, private balconies, and urban views create bright, uplifting living spaces.
copy.apartments_hero_subheading: New studio and 1-bedroom apartments designed to maximize comfort, natural light, and everyday convenience in Othello.
copy.apartments_intro_body: Our new studio and 1-bedroom apartments at Atrium Court are all about maximizing comfort and convenience. We’ve created spacious, light-filled interiors that feel open and inviting, even within a compact, efficient design. With smart open floor plans and streamlined layouts, each apartment is the perfect blend of modern style and everyday function.
copy.community_additional_text: Online rental payments, onsite management, and practical building features make daily life easier, so you can focus on enjoying your home and neighborhood.
copy.community_feature_1_text: Step into our beautiful open courtyard area, a welcoming communal outdoor space perfect for relaxing or connecting with neighbors.
copy.community_feature_2_text: Be inspired every day by local public art, including a lighted rotating sculpture by artist Fumi Amano that shares warm greetings in many languages.
copy.community_feature_3_text: Ground-floor retail brings authentic neighborhood businesses right to your doorstep, contributing to the energy and vitality of Othello.
copy.community_hero_heading: Sustainable Living, Right Where the City Connects.
copy.community_hero_subheading: Welcome to your community hub at Atrium Court, where thoughtful amenities and local culture come together.
copy.community_intro_body:
At Atrium Court, we believe a great home extends beyond your front door. Our amenities are thoughtfully designed to foster connection, celebrate the local culture, and make life vibrant right where you live.

From our central courtyard to local art and neighborhood-focused retail, your home base is part of a larger, connected community.
copy.contact_form_success_message: Thanks — we received your message. Our leasing team will reply within one business day.
copy.contact_intro_body: Have questions about availability, floor plans, or the leasing process? Our leasing team is available to answer questions and schedule tours. We’re here to help you find the right Terrapin home.
copy.contact_tour_body: See Terrapin in person—schedule a private tour to view available floor plans and amenities. Tours are available by appointment; we can accommodate weekday evenings and weekend viewings upon request.
copy.contact_tour_success_message: Your tour request is confirmed. Check your email for appointment details and arrival instructions.
copy.global_address_line1: 7324 Martin Luther King Jr Way S
copy.global_legal_equal_housing_text: Terrapin is an equal housing opportunity provider. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability, familial status, or any other protected characteristic.
copy.global_legal_fair_housing_footer_text: Equal Housing Opportunity. This property complies with fair housing laws and provides housing without discrimination on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, handicap, familial status, or national origin.
copy.global_meta_description: Atrium Court offers affordable, transit-connected apartment homes in Seattle’s Othello neighborhood, with modern interiors, a central courtyard, and community-focused amenities.
copy.global_meta_title: Atrium Court | Othello Village, Seattle Apartment Homes
copy.global_parking_policy_summary: Assigned on-site parking is available for an additional monthly fee. Limited visitor parking and EV charging stations available. Parking assignments are subject to availability.
copy.global_pet_policy_summary: Cats and dogs are welcome. Maximum of two pets per apartment. Breed and weight restrictions apply. Pet deposit and monthly pet rent required; proof of vaccinations and registration may be requested.
copy.global_screening_critical_info: All applicants must present a valid photo ID and provide income verification for the most recent 30–60 days. Tours are by appointment. Some units and amenities may have additional fees; assigned parking is limited and not guaranteed without a signed parking agreement.
copy.global_screening_rental_criteria: Minimum credit score: 620 (exceptions reviewed case-by-case). Gross household income should be at least 2.5x the monthly rent. No evictions within the past 5 years. Applicants must pass a criminal background check and provide two landlord or personal references. Application fee and consent for background/credit checks required. Co-signers may be accepted with documented qualifying income.
copy.global_tagline: Where Othello connects. Your diverse city home.
copy.home_affordable_text: We offer a limited number of income-restricted units for qualifying households. Availability varies; apply to learn about current eligibility and waitlist procedures.
copy.home_closer_text: Schedule a tour or contact leasing to learn more about available homes, amenities, and our resident experience.
copy.home_hero_heading: Where Othello Connects. Your Diverse City Home.
copy.home_hero_subheading: Welcome to Atrium Court Apartments, your future home in the heart of Seattle’s dynamic Othello neighborhood.
copy.home_highlight_apartments_text: Designed with efficiency in mind, our apartments offer highly functional living spaces in a compact footprint, with modern finishes and bright interiors.
copy.home_highlight_community_text: Our open, atrium-style courtyard and ground-floor retail create an inviting community hub for residents and neighbors alike.
copy.home_highlight_neighborhood_text: Centered around the Othello Link Light Rail station, our neighborhood is a vibrant, multicultural hub with parks, dining, and local businesses.
copy.home_intro_body:
Atrium Court offers affordable, modern living designed for efficiency right in the heart of the dynamic Othello urban village. With the Link Light Rail station at your doorstep, you’ll have unparalleled access to major hubs like Downtown Seattle.

Residents enjoy a culturally rich environment with on-site community-focused public art and ground-floor retail, all within steps of diverse dining, parks, and local amenities.
copy.home_pitch_1_text: Thoughtfully designed apartments maximize comfort, natural light, and usable space, even within compact, efficient footprints.
copy.home_pitch_2_text: With Link Light Rail and local bus lines nearby, commuting to Downtown, the University District, and beyond is simple and convenient.
copy.home_pitch_3_text: A welcoming courtyard, local art, and neighborhood-focused retail help foster a strong sense of community and connection.
copy.listings_intro_body: Search current availability and take the next step toward making Atrium Court your home. Schedule a tour or contact our leasing team to learn more about floor plans, qualifications, and move-in timing.
copy.listings_no_availability_message: We’re currently at capacity. Join our waitlist or contact leasing to be notified when units become available.
copy.listings_pre_screening_text: All applicants must submit a completed application and supporting documents. Application fee applies. Applicants will undergo credit, criminal background, and rental history screening; please confirm you meet minimum income and credit guidelines before applying.
copy.neighborhood_feature_blocks: [{"title":"Diverse Shopping","text":"Nearby Safeway is complemented by numerous international markets that offer specialized spices, unique produce, and global goods for everyday cooking."},{"title":"International Cuisine","text":"Othello is renowned for its authentic East African and Vietnamese restaurants, along with other international flavors and local favorites."},{"title":"Othello Park","text":"Just steps away, Othello Park offers a generous 7.5-acre green space with a playground, basketball courts, picnic areas, and walking paths."},{"title":"Connected by Transit","text":"Being just one block from the Othello Link Light Rail Station ensures easy commuting to Downtown, the University of Washington, and beyond."}]
copy.neighborhood_hero_heading: Join Us. Build the Othello Village.
copy.neighborhood_hero_subheading: Welcome home to one of Seattle’s most culturally rich and connected urban villages.
copy.neighborhood_intro_body:
Welcome to the Othello neighborhood and the Rainier Valley. Our location at 7324 Martin Luther King Jr Way S is situated right in one of the most culturally rich communities in the United States. The entire area is distinguished by its exceptional diversity and culture, thanks to its long history of serving as a key welcoming center for immigrant communities from around the world. This inclusive and vibrant spirit remains fundamental to the neighborhood’s identity today.

The Othello neighborhood is a wonderful place to live, with a strong vision for the future that prioritizes long-term affordability, new amenities, and connected community life.
copy.neighborhood_transit_text: Just one block from the Othello Link Light Rail Station, with good access to local bus lines and I-5, commuting to Downtown Seattle and the University of Washington is straightforward.
copy.neighborhood_walkability_text: Everyday necessities, international markets, and local dining spots are close by, making it easy to enjoy a walkable, connected urban village lifestyle.

listings.marketingTitle: Terrapin - Discover Elevated Living in the Heart of Downtown Bellevue
listings.marketingDescription:
Welcome to Bellevue’s newest high-rise community—where modern design, upscale comfort, and unmatched convenience come together. Choose from stylish studios, spacious one- and two-bedroom homes, or unique lofted floorplans designed to complement your lifestyle. Nearly every home features the added convenience of an in-unit washer and dryer, along with must-have essentials like a full-sized refrigerator, dishwasher, and complete stove package. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame incredible natural light and sweeping city views, creating a bright, inviting space to call home.

Step outside your door and enjoy a suite of exceptional amenities. A state-of-the-art parking garage makes coming and going effortless, while the fully equipped fitness center supports your wellness routine. Entertain or unwind on the rooftop, complete with a modern kitchen and panoramic vistas. With onsite management and maintenance, plus valet trash service, every detail is designed for ease and comfort.

Live steps from Bellevue’s premier dining, shopping, and entertainment—where luxury meets convenience, and home meets possibility. Welcome to your next-level living experience.
